functional_analysis.primary_function: Regulate environmental conditions within an indoor greenhouse.

functions.name: Temperature Sensor
functions.description: Measures ambient temperature within the greenhouse.

functions.name: Humidity Sensor
functions.description: Measures ambient humidity within the greenhouse.

functions.name: Climate Control Algorithm
functions.description: Processes temperature and humidity data to generate actuation commands.

functions.name: Heater Actuator
functions.description: Activates the heating system to raise temperature.

functions.name: Misting Actuator
functions.description: Activates the misting system to increase humidity.

flows.description: Temperature sensor data sent to climate control algorithm.
Humidity sensor data sent to climate control algorithm.
Heater activation command sent to heater actuator.
Misting activation command sent to misting actuator.

required_assemblies.name: Climate Regulation Assembly
required_assemblies.purpose: Processes sensor data to generate actuation commands

required_assemblies.name: Actuation Assembly
required_assemblies.purpose: Applies heating and misting to maintain conditions
